about.en: Aptos is a proof-of-stake Layer 1 designed for high throughput and reliability. APT is used for fees, staking, and governance.
about.es: Aptos es una capa 1 (Layer 1) de prueba de participación (proof-of-stake) diseñada para alto rendimiento y fiabilidad. APT se usa para comisiones, staking (staking) y gobernanza (governance).
about.ca: Aptos és una capa 1 (Layer 1) de prova de participació (proof-of-stake) dissenyada per a alt rendiment i fiabilitat. APT s'utilitza per a comissions, staking (staking) i governança (governance).
